title: Flaming Decal Monster Truck Coloring Page

funFacts: Monster trucks are custom-built vehicles featuring massive 66-inch tires and high-output engines producing up to 1,500 horsepower.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
